task_completion.description: Configure the pitch angle sweep range and step size
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QBlade simulation definition/setup window, the pitch angle sweep parameters are set to start at -2, end at 15, with a step (delta) of 1.

task_completion.description: Configure the fixed Tip Speed Ratio (TSR)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the simulation setup window, the Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) parameter is set to a fixed value of 7.
In the simulation setup window, the wind speed parameter is set to 10 m/s.
A graph showing the simulation results (e.g., a Cp vs. Pitch angle characteristic curve) is visible, or data tables are populated with 18 sweep points, indicating the simulation has completed.

task_completion.description: Save the project with the simulation results to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/projects/' and filename 'pitch_sweep_result.wpa', or a file manager/terminal confirming this exact file has been created.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The QBlade application interface is visible and actively being used to configure parameters and run the simulation, rather than using a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually executed and not just an empty project saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The results graph (e.g., Cp vs Pitch) or data tables in QBlade are populated with actual data points/curves before the project is saved.

integrity.description: Verify the output file was not spoofed
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use terminal commands like 'touch' or a text editor to create a fake or empty 'pitch_sweep_result.wpa' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using QBlade v0.96.2 to perform a pitch angle sweep simulation. Key parameters to verify in the GUI: Pitch angle range from -2 to +15 degrees with 1-degree steps (18 sweep points total), fixed Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 7, and wind speed of 10 m/s. The simulation should generate a Cp vs. pitch angle characteristic curve. The final project must be saved as a .wpa file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/pitch_sweep_result.wpa.
